title: Team Workspaces
message: Create or join a team workspace and share captures with your team. A shared live feed shows what everyone has shared, with optional notes. Invite anyone with an 8-character code — no account setup required from them.

title: AI Semantic Memory Search
message: Memory search now understands meaning, not just keywords. Toggle the ⚡ AI button on the Memory page and type naturally — "what did I decide about pricing last month" — and it finds relevant memories even if the words don't match exactly.

title: Referral Dashboard
message: A full in-app referral hub. See your signups, activation count, reward tier, and animated progress toward the next milestone (1 → 3 → 5 → 10 referrals). Unlock Pro access by inviting friends.

title: Goals: Circular Progress Ring + Milestone Dates
message: Goal cards now show an animated circular progress ring coloured by life area. Each milestone can have a target date — overdue milestones are flagged in red. Descriptions are now inline-editable with a single click.

title: Share Any Capture to Your Team
message: When you have an active workspace, a Share button appears on every capture card. Tap it, add an optional note for context, and it appears instantly in your team's shared feed.

title: Notion & Google Calendar Export
message: Export your entire second brain to Notion-compatible JSON (imports directly into Notion databases) or as a .ics calendar file for Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, and Outlook. Find both in Settings → Data Ownership.

title: Swipe Gestures on Mobile
message: Swipe right on any capture card to pin it to Today. Swipe left to archive it. Native touch events — no tap targets needed. Works everywhere captures appear: Inbox, Today, Ideas Vault.

title: Duplicate Capture Detection
message: Before you submit a capture, InsightHalo checks if you've already captured something similar (55%+ word overlap). An amber warning shows the matching capture so you don't create duplicates.

title: Tag Suggestions While You Type
message: The capture input now suggests tags based on what you've used before. Click any chip to append #tag to your capture. Toggle the tag bar with the tag icon in the toolbar.

title: Smarter AI Chat
message: AI Chat now has full context of your second brain: this week's captures vs older ones, your active projects, memory entries, and ideas. Ask it anything and get answers grounded in your actual data.

title: Command Palette (⌘K)
message: Press Cmd+K (or Ctrl+K) anywhere in the app to open the command palette. Navigate to any page, open Quick Capture, start a Pomodoro, or ask AI — all without touching your mouse.

title: Weekly Review Ritual
message: A guided 10-minute end-of-week review. Clear your inbox, review completed projects, capture loose ends, and set next week's focus — all in one structured flow.

title: Push Notifications
message: Enable browser push notifications in Settings to get notified about reminders, review nudges, and new feature announcements — even when InsightHalo isn't open.

title: Voice Capture
message: Tap the mic and speak naturally. Your words are transcribed instantly and AI organises them just like a text capture. Perfect for capturing ideas on the go.
